title: Analytics - Events are gathered if user is logged out but opted into data-sharing
scenario: Firebase events are gathered for logged-out users who have opted into data-sharing
steps: Ensure the user has opted into data-sharing.
Trigger any Firebase event (e.g., device_added which gathers the device's serial number).
Check Firebase to verify that the event count for that device's serial number has increased.
expected: The event count for the device's serial number increases on Firebase.
